parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_teaming_partners (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  company_name VARCHAR(255),
  cage_code VARCHAR(20),
  duns VARCHAR(20),
  uei VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE,
  size_status VARCHAR(50),
  socio_economic VARCHAR(255),
  naics_codes TEXT,
  core_capabilities TEXT,
  past_teaming_with_gda BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  past_teaming_details TEXT,
  contract_vehicles TEXT,
  geographic_presence TEXT,
  key_personnel TEXT,
  relationship_strength VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'New',
  nda_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'None',
  ta_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'None',
  notes TEXT,
  source VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'Manual',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
SELECT true as success;
